name: KyselyTableManager can Handle default values in table definitions

steps.name: should create a table with default values successfully

expect("CREATE TABLE \"plugin_default_values\" (\"id\" integer primary key autoincrement, \"status\" text default 'active' not null, \"created_at\" integer default CUR... <truncated>).toContain("\"status\" text default 'active' not null")

expect("CREATE TABLE \"plugin_default_values\" (\"id\" integer primary key autoincrement, \"status\" text default 'active' not null, \"created_at\" integer default CUR... <truncated>).toContain("\"created_at\" integer default CURRENT_TIMESTAMP not null")
